description_long: This shotgun features a robust, dark metallic receiver and barrel assembly, paired with a wooden stock and foregrip that display a natural brown grain. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a series of vent holes along the top, likely for heat dissipation, and a front sight post. The drum magazine is prominent beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity design. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a simple trigger mechanism, while the stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The overall finish is a mix of glossy black metal and matte wood, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance.
description: A classic shotgun with a long, vented black barrel, wooden stock, and a drum magazine beneath the receiver. The finish combines glossy metal and matte wood for a rugged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented barrel, and the rounded drum magazine below.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full wooden stock, long vented barrel, and the prominent drum magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
